delta.duration_ms: +38044ms (with_skill takes longer due to framework steps)

analyst_notes: with_skill scores 100% on all three evals — perfect compliance with CLOUTER criteria.
without_skill scores 33-50% — struggles on format (multi-section vs single paragraph), exact responsibility clause wording, and log updating.
The no_banned_words assertion passes for both — not discriminating. Consider removing or replacing with a harder-to-meet quality check.
The biggest differentiator: with_skill always produces the exact responsibility clause verbatim and 'Log updated.' — both are 0% on baseline.
Eval 2 (published whitepaper) shows highest baseline score (50%) because much context was pre-supplied in the prompt — the skill adds less value when inputs are already crystal clear.
Token cost is ~34% higher with skill, and runtime is ~2.5x longer — expected trade-off for the structured workflow.
